/mingw64/bin/c++.exe -Wl,--enable-auto-import CMakeFiles/aestool_tests.dir/src/tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aestool_tests.dir/src/crypto_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aestool_tests.dir/src/utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aestool_tests.dir/include/catch2/catch_amalgamated.cpp.o -o aestool_tests.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libaestool_tests.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0  /e/MatMaUngDung/Labs/external/cryptopp/lib/libcryptopp.a
